title: prismatomeris khoonmengiana
intro: Prismatomeris khoonmengiana, also known as Khoon Meng's prismatomeris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prismatomeris khoonmengiana include relief from fever, inflammation, and infections, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional medicine to make a decoction or tincture.
